title: Amtech K1150 6 Piece Tubular Box Spanner Set with Tommy bar
features: FOR NARROW SPACES: This set of 6 tubular, double-ended box spanners is ideal for loosening or tightening nuts and bolts in narrow recesses
INCLUDES: Box spanner sizes: 6-7mm, 8-9m, 10-11mm, 12-13mm, 14-15mm and 16-17mm, plus a 150mm double-ended Tommy bar
DURABLE: The set has a satin finish for enhanced durability
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: From the manufacturer 6pc box spanner & tommy bar Set includes sizes 6 – 7mm, 8 – 9mm, 10 – 11mm, 12 – 13mm, 14 – 15mm and 16 – 17mm Includes 150mm long tommy bar About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty , Integrity and Trust .
